description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a detached garage, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several mature trees. The main building features a hip roof with gray shingles and light pink brick exterior walls. The front of the house has a covered entryway with two tall, narrow windows flanking the main door, and a driveway leading to the garage. The backyard is enclosed by a fence and includes a patio area with outdoor furniture, as well as landscaped flower beds along the perimeter. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, and the property is bordered by low flower beds and shrubbery. The overall design is reminiscent of a modern American suburban home with traditional elements.
description: A two-story pink brick house with a hip roof, detached garage, and landscaped yard featuring mature trees and flower beds. Symmetrical windows and a covered entryway define its suburban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, detached garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and flower beds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, garage, and backyard with visible fencing and additional trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, patio area with outdoor furniture, and mature trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main facade, entryway, and garage, with a clear view of the symmetrical window arrangement.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, flanked by tall narrow windows, and a simple overhang.
